name: Zenko: A Fox's Tale
short_description: Join Zenko the Fox on a whimsical 3D platforming adventure.
detailed_description:
Zenko: A Fox's tale is a 3D adventure platformer that takes place in a Japanese inspired environment. A whimsical fox must move between realms to capture wandering spirits, discover new abilities, and restore an abandoned shrine.

Features

  • Beautiful environments based off the art and nature of Japan
  • 3 levels to explore
  • Quick and responsive platforming gameplay
  • several secrets to discover
  • Bonus artwork and levels from finding secrets
  • A very cute fox and some very cute spirits

Extra Background

Zenko: A Fox's Tale was created by an indie development team of graduate students from the Florida Interactive Entertainment Academy (FIEA). Over the course of 7 months, the team built Zenko from the ground up, brainstorming to release. We welcome any feedback that can be used to improve the game, and hope that everyone who plays has a great time!
